def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate indicators
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['atr_window']).average_true_range()
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Long condition: Close above upper ATR band and RSI > threshold
    upper_band = df['close'] + (atr * params['atr_multiplier'])
    signals[(df['close'] > upper_band) & (rsi > params['rsi_threshold'])] = 1
    
    # Short condition: Close below lower ATR band and RSI < (100 - threshold)
    lower_band = df['close'] - (atr * params['atr_multiplier'])
    signals[(df['close'] < lower_band) & (rsi < (100 - params['rsi_threshold']))] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits momentum breakout behavior when price exceeds ATR-based volatility bands confirmed by RSI strength/weakness thresholds.
